zh.Cotham, , Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾可坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Leeke於大約1350年出生時，他的父親Simon Leeke23歲，母親Margaret Vaux17歲。他和Isabel Towers至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他於1390年被列為member of parliament for nottinghamshire。他去世於1415年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾可坦享年66歲。

zh-hans.Cotham, , Nottinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾可坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Leeke于大约1350年出生时，他的父亲Simon Leeke23岁，母亲Margaret Vaux17岁。他和Isabel Towers至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他于1390年被列为member of parliament for nottinghamshire。他去世于1415年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾可坦享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leeke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leake
meanings: habitational name from Leake (Lincolnshire), East and West Leake (Nottinghamshire), Leek (Staffordshire), Leck (Lancashire), Leak (NorthYorkshire), or Leak Hall in Cumberworth (West Yorkshire). The placenames derive from Old English lece or Old Scandinavian lœkr, both meaning ‘brook’. See also Like .
possibly also a nickname from Middle English lek ‘leek’ (Old English lēac), perhaps for a grower or seller of leeks.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Leeke was born about 1350, his father, Simon Leeke, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Vaux, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Isabel Towers. In 1390, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for nottinghamshire. He died in 1415, in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Leeke est né environ 1350, son père, Simon Leeke, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Vaux, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Isabel Towers. En 1390, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Il est décédé en 1415, à Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Leeke um 1350 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Leeke 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Vaux 17. Er hatte mit Isabel Towers mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1390, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for nottinghamshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Leeke è nato il circa 1350, il suo padre, Simon Leeke, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Vaux, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Isabel Towers. Nel 1390, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Morì nel 1415, nel Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Leekeが約1350年に生まれた時，父Simon Leekeは23歳，母Margaret Vauxは17歳であった。彼はIsabel Towersとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1390年，41歳の時，職業はmember of parliament for nottinghamshireと記録されている。彼は1415年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコサムで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Leeke(이)가 대략 1350년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Leeke(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Vaux(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Isabel Towers(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1390년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament for nottinghamshire이었다. 그는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 컷함에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Cotham, , Nottinghamshire, England: Cotham, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Leeke nasceu aproximadamente 1350, seu pai, Simon Leeke, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Vaux, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabel Towers. Em 1390, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Ele faleceu em 1415, em Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Leeke родился около 1350 г., его отцу по имени Simon Leeke было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Vaux, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Isabel Towers. В 1390 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Он умер в 1415 г. в местности котам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Leeke nació aproximadamente 1350, su papá, Simon Leeke, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Vaux, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabel Towers. En 1390, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Murió en 1415, en Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
